Game.Name: Hiryuu no Ken S - Hyper Version (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Ultimate Fighter is a fighting game, developed by Culture Brain and published by Natsume Co. LTD. Released on the Super Nintendo in 1993. It's an updated re-release of Hiryu no Ken S: Golden Fighter, which received a US localization as well as various updates including an option to speed up the game.Gameplay:Ultimate Fighter is a fighting game which contains single player and multiplayer modes. The single player mode plays like a brawler with the occasional one-on-one fight against various strong opponents. While in Versus Mode the player has the choice of selecting the following characters:Ryuhi (Ryuhi is the only playable character in the single player mode)Min MinFalconFishJakeJoeLeoMusashiSanadaSawamuraWillyZebraWith the exception of the first two, each subsequent pair of characters are palette swaps. This allows two players to effectively play the same fighter.
Game.Notes: Hiryu no Ken S: Hyper Version is an Action game, developed and published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 1992.
